name: PATCH /api/leads/:id/owner - Reassign a lead to a different presales owner
description: Reassign endpoint behind the admin-cockpit Lead Detail screen's owner picker. Persists the new owner_id, records a lead.assigned audit row, and emits a lead.assigned envelope event so the notification subscriber can ping the new owner. owner_id MUST be a valid UUID; the user-service membership check lands in P2.
skipReason: lead-service runs on port 4011 (per .env MONOREPO PORT MAP); the projexlight test runner targets a single base URL (4010 = user-service). Re-enable once the API gateway/BFF lands or the runner gains per-route base-URL support.

testCases.name: Reassign a lead to the registered user
